main.class: text-center flex flex-col justify-center px-3 py-10 min-h-screen
main.h2: Sorry, the page you're looking for isn't here

a.class: inline-block relative flex cursor-pointer items-center justify-center overflow-hidden opacity-hover font-medium text-white bg-black hover:text-white border-black blackshadow f-button

main.div:
Ok, let's see if we can help you find the right page.
Visit our support center or contact us for help to get started.
